summary: Iteration 145 - Requests Module + Sample Flow + Guest Checkout Activation. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). Fixed bug in customer_order_routes.py (payload.full_name → payload.customer_name). Fixed ActivateAccountPage.jsx error handling for invalid tokens. Frontend verified: Checkout 2-column layout, payment confirmation checkbox, payment selection page, activation page.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data. Created test requests and sample workflows during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) POST /api/requests works for all 4 types (promo_custom, promo_sample, product_bulk, service_quote) for both guests and authenticated users, 2) Guest requests auto-create invited accounts with invite tokens, 3) GET /api/requests/ctas returns CTA button config, 4) GET /api/admin/requests lists requests with enriched customer data, 5) PUT /api/admin/requests/{id}/assign assigns sales owner, 6) POST /api/admin/requests/{id}/create-quote creates quote with 20% margin, 7) POST /api/admin/samples/from-request/{id} creates sample workflow from promo_sample, 8) PUT /api/admin/samples/{id}/update-status progresses sample status, 9) POST /api/admin/samples/{id}/approve with admin_override approves sample, 10) POST /api/admin/samples/{id}/create-actual-order-quote creates production quote after approval, 11) POST /api/guest/orders returns account_invite info, 12) Checkout page has 2-column layout for Payment Method + Payment Confirmation, 13) Submit button disabled without payment confirmation checkbox, 14) Activation page shows proper error for invalid tokens.

F1_request_creation_guest_promo_custom.details: POST /api/requests with request_type=promo_custom for guest creates request and returns account_invite

F2_request_creation_guest_promo_sample.details: POST /api/requests with request_type=promo_sample for guest works correctly

F3_request_creation_guest_product_bulk.details: POST /api/requests with request_type=product_bulk for guest works correctly

F4_request_creation_guest_service_quote.details: POST /api/requests with request_type=service_quote for guest works correctly

F5_request_creation_authenticated.details: POST /api/requests with authenticated customer works, no account_invite returned

F6_request_ctas.details: GET /api/requests/ctas returns public and account_shortcuts CTAs for products, promotional_materials, services

F7_admin_requests_list.details: GET /api/admin/requests returns list with enriched customer_name and customer_email

F8_assign_sales_owner.details: PUT /api/admin/requests/{id}/assign assigns sales_owner_id and updates status to under_review

F10_create_sample_workflow.details: POST /api/admin/samples/from-request/{id} creates sample workflow with quote (1000 → 1200)

F11_update_sample_status.details: PUT /api/admin/samples/{id}/update-status progresses sample status through SAMPLE_FLOW

F13_create_actual_order_quote.details: POST /api/admin/samples/{id}/create-actual-order-quote creates production quote after approval (10000 → 12000)

F14_guest_order_account_invite.details: POST /api/guest/orders returns account_invite with invite_token and invite_url for new guests

F15_checkout_2_column_layout.details: Payment Method and Payment Confirmation sections are side-by-side on desktop (grid md:grid-cols-2)

F16_payment_confirmation_required.details: Submit button disabled when checkbox unchecked, shows 'Confirm Payment to Submit'

F17_payment_selection_page.details: Payment selection page renders correctly with bank transfer active, mobile money disabled

F18_activation_page_invalid_token.details: Activation page shows 'Invalid or expired token.' for invalid tokens

F19_existing_logins.details: All login flows work: customer, admin, sales, vendor (via /api/partner-auth/login)

bugs_fixed.issue: Invalid token showed 'Network error' instead of 'Invalid or expired token'
bugs_fixed.fix: Added try-catch around JSON parsing to handle 400 responses properly

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending is MOCKED - logged to email_logs collection, not actually dispatched. Requires Resend integration for production.
